SABA formulates reasoning as a recursive process that alternates between structured state construction and obstacle resolution: it first applies Information Fusion to consolidate the narrative into a verifiable base state, and then uses Query-driven Structured Reasoning to identify and resolve missing or underspecified premises by turning them into queries and progressively completing the reasoning state through hypothesis construction and state refinement. Across multiple evaluation metrics, SABA achieves the best performance on all three difficulty splits of the non-interactive Detective Puzzle benchmark, and it also maintains leading results on multiple public benchmarks.
title_zh: 行动前的自我觉察：通过主动的认知意识缓解逻辑惰性
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型在众多推理任务中表现优异，但往往缺乏对其当前知识或推理状态是否完整的自我意识。在非交互式谜题场景中，故事情节固定且底层结构隐匿；一旦模型基于不完整前提形成早期假设，错误便会贯穿整个推理过程，导致结论不稳定。为解决这一问题，我们提出SABA——一种在做出最终决策前显式引入对缺失前提自我认知的推理框架。SABA将推理过程建模为递归式的交替结构：先通过信息融合（Information Fusion）将叙事整合为可验证的基础状态，再利用基于查询的结构化推理（Query-driven Structured Reasoning），将缺失或模糊的前提转化为可查询的问题，并通过逐步构建假设与优化状态来完善推理链条。在多个评估指标下，SABA在非交互式侦探谜题基准测试的三个难度层级上均取得最佳表现，同时也在多个公开基准测试中保持领先水平。

title: WebGen-R1: Incentivizing Large Language Models to Generate Functional and Aesthetic Websites with Reinforcement Learning
authors: Juyong Jiang, Chenglin Cai, Chansung Park, Jiasi Shen, Sunghun Kim, Jianguo Li, Yue Wang
abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at function-level code generation, project-level tasks such as generating functional and visually aesthetic multi-page websites remain highly challenging. Existing works are often limited to single-page static websites, while agentic frameworks typically rely on multi-turn execution with proprietary models, leading to substantial token costs, high latency, and brittle integration. Training a small LLM end-to-end with reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising alternative, yet it faces a critical bottleneck in designing reliable and computationally feasible rewards for website generation. Unlike single-file coding tasks that can be verified by unit tests, website generation requires evaluating inherently subjective aesthetics, cross-page interactions, and functional correctness. To this end, we propose WebGen-R1, an end-to-end RL framework tailored for project-level website generation. We first introduce a scaffold-driven structured generation paradigm that constrains the large open-ended action space and preserves architectural integrity. We then design a novel cascaded multimodal reward that seamlessly couples structural guarantees with execution-grounded functional feedback and vision-based aesthetic supervision. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our WebGen-R1 substantially transforms a 7B base model from generating nearly nonfunctional websites into producing deployable, aesthetically aligned multi-page websites. Remarkably, our WebGen-R1 not only consistently outperforms heavily scaled open-source models (up to 72B), but also rivals the state-of-the-art DeepSeek-R1 (671B) in functional success, while substantially exceeding it in valid rendering and aesthetic alignment. These results position WebGen-R1 as a viable path for scaling small open models from function-level code generation to project-level web application generation.
title_zh: WebGen-R1：通过强化学习激励大型语言模型生成功能与美学兼备的网站
abstract_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在函数级代码生成方面表现出色，但在项目级任务——如生成功能完备且视觉美观的多页面网站——方面仍面临巨大挑战。现有方法通常局限于单页静态网站的生成，而基于智能体的框架则往往依赖于多轮执行和专有模型，导致高昂的token消耗、高延迟以及脆弱的集成问题。采用强化学习（RL）对小型LLM进行端到端训练是一种有前景的替代方案，但其关键瓶颈在于如何设计出可靠且计算可行的奖励机制以用于网站生成。与可通过单元测试验证的单文件编程任务不同，网站生成需要评估本质上主观的美学、跨页面交互以及功能正确性。为此，我们提出WebGen-R1，一个专为项目级网站生成设计的端到端强化学习框架。我们首先引入一种基于模板驱动的结构化生成范式，有效约束了庞大且开放的动作空间，同时保持了架构完整性。随后，我们设计了一种新颖的级联式多模态奖励机制，无缝融合结构保障、基于执行反馈的功能验证以及基于视觉的美学监督。大量实验表明，我们的WebGen-R1将一个7B规模的基础模型从几乎无法生成可用网站的能力，显著提升至能够产出可部署、视觉协调的多页面网站。尤为突出的是，WebGen-R1不仅持续优于规模庞大的开源模型（最高达72B），甚至在功能成功率上媲美当前最先进的DeepSeek-R1（671B），同时在有效渲染和美学一致性方面表现更优。这些成果表明，WebGen-R1为将小型开源模型从函数级代码生成拓展至项目级网页应用生成提供了一条切实可行的路径。

title: LLM-Guided Safety Agent for Edge Robotics with an ISO-Compliant Perception-Compute-Control Architecture
authors: Xu Huang, Ruofan Zhang, Lu Cheng, Yuefeng Song, Xu Huang, Huayu Zhang, Sheng Yin, Anyang Liang, Chen Qian, Yin Zhou, Xiaoyun Yuan, Yuan Cheng
abstract: Ensuring functional safety in human-robot interaction is challenging because AI perception is inherently probabilistic, whereas industrial standards require deterministic behavior. We present an LLM-guided safety agent for edge robotics, built on an ISO-compliant low-latency perception-compute-control architecture. Our method translates natural-language safety regulations into executable predicates and deploys them through a redundant heterogeneous edge runtime. For fault-tolerant closed-loop execution under edge constraints, we adopt a symmetric dual-modular redundancy design with parallel independent execution for low-latency perception, computation, and control. We prototype the system on a dual-RK3588 platform and evaluate it in representative human-robot interaction scenarios. The results demonstrate a practical edge implementation path toward ISO 13849 Category 3 and PL d using cost-effective hardware, supporting practical deployment of safety-critical embodied AI.
title_zh: 基于大语言模型引导的边缘机器人安全代理：一种符合ISO标准的感知-计算-控制架构
abstract_zh: 在人机交互中确保功能安全具有挑战性，因为人工智能感知本质上是概率性的，而工业标准则要求确定性行为。我们提出了一种基于大语言模型（LLM）引导的安全代理，用于边缘机器人系统，该系统建立在符合ISO标准的低延迟感知-计算-控制架构之上。我们的方法将自然语言描述的安全规范转化为可执行的谓词，并通过冗余异构边缘运行时进行部署。为在边缘计算约束下实现容错的闭环执行，我们采用对称双模冗余设计，通过并行独立执行实现低延迟的感知、计算与控制。我们在双RK3588平台原型化了该系统，并在典型的人机交互场景中进行了评估。结果表明，该方案提供了一条切实可行的边缘实现路径，可在成本效益高的硬件上满足ISO 13849 Category 3和PL d的要求，支持安全关键型具身人工智能的实际部署。

title: To Know is to Construct: Schema-Constrained Generation for Agent Memory
authors: Lei Zheng, Weinan Song, Daili Li, Yanming Yang
abstract: Constructivist epistemology argues that knowledge is actively constructed rather than passively copied. Despite the generative nature of Large Language Models (LLMs), most existing agent memory systems are still based on dense retrieval. However, dense retrieval heavily relies on semantic overlap or entity matching within sentences. Consequently, embeddings often fail to distinguish instances that are semantically similar but contextually distinct, introducing substantial noise by retrieving context-mismatched entries. Conversely, directly employing open-ended generation for memory access risks "Structural Hallucination" where the model generates memory keys that do not exist in the memory, leading to lookup failures. Inspired by this epistemology, we posit that memory is fundamentally organized by cognitive schemas, and valid recall must be a generative process performed within these schematic structures. To realize this, we propose SCG-MEM, a schema-constrained generative memory architecture. SCG-MEM reformulates memory access as Schema-Constrained Generation. By maintaining a dynamic Cognitive Schema, we strictly constrain LLM decoding to generate only valid memory entry keys, providing a formal guarantee against structural hallucinations. To support long-term adaptation, we model memory updates via assimilation (grounding inputs into existing schemas) and accommodation (expanding schemas with novel concepts). Furthermore, we construct an Associative Graph to enable multi-hop reasoning through activation propagation. Experiments on the LoCoMo benchmark show that SCG-MEM substantially improves performance across all categories over retrieval-based baselines.
title_zh: 知即建构：面向智能体记忆的模式约束生成
abstract_zh: 建构主义认识论认为，知识是主动建构的，而非被动复制的。尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）具有生成性特征，但现有的大多数智能体记忆系统仍基于密集检索。然而，密集检索严重依赖句子内部的语义重叠或实体匹配，因此嵌入表示往往难以区分语义相似但语境不同的实例，导致检索出与上下文不符的记忆条目，引入大量噪声。相反，直接采用开放式生成来访问记忆则可能引发“结构幻觉”问题——即模型生成并不存在于记忆中的记忆键，从而造成查找失败。受此认识论启发，我们提出：记忆本质上由认知图式组织，有效的回忆必须是在这些图式结构内进行的生成过程。为实现这一理念，我们提出了SCG-MEM，一种基于图式的生成式记忆架构。SCG-MEM将记忆访问重新定义为“图式约束生成”。通过维护一个动态的认知图式，我们严格限制LLM的解码过程，仅允许生成合法的记忆条目键，从而在形式上杜绝结构幻觉的发生。为了支持长期适应，我们通过同化（将新输入融入现有图式）和顺应（以新概念扩展图式）来建模记忆更新机制。此外，我们构建了一个关联图，通过激活传播实现多跳推理。在LoCoMo基准测试中的实验表明，SCG-MEM在所有类别上均显著优于基于检索的基线方法。

title: AVISE: Framework for Evaluating the Security of AI Systems
authors: Mikko Lempinen, Joni Kemppainen, Niklas Raesalmi
abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI) systems are increasingly deployed across critical domains, their security vulnerabilities pose growing risks of high-profile exploits and consequential system failures. Yet systematic approaches to evaluating AI security remain underdeveloped. In this paper, we introduce AVISE (AI Vulnerability Identification and Security Evaluation), a modular open-source framework for identifying vulnerabilities in and evaluating the security of AI systems and models. As a demonstration of the framework, we extend the theory-of-mind-based multi-turn Red Queen attack into an Adversarial Language Model (ALM) augmented attack and develop an automated Security Evaluation Test (SET) for discovering jailbreak vulnerabilities in language models. The SET comprises 25 test cases and an Evaluation Language Model (ELM) that determines whether each test case was able to jailbreak the target model, achieving 92% accuracy, an F1-score of 0.91, and a Matthews correlation coefficient of 0.83. We evaluate nine recently released language models of diverse sizes with the SET and find that all are vulnerable to the augmented Red Queen attack to varying degrees. AVISE provides researchers and industry practitioners with an extensible foundation for developing and deploying automated SETs, offering a concrete step toward more rigorous and reproducible AI security evaluation.
title_zh: AVISE：评估人工智能系统安全性的框架
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能（AI）系统在关键领域中的部署日益广泛，其安全漏洞带来的高调攻击风险和系统故障隐患也不断加剧。然而，针对AI安全性的系统性评估方法仍处于发展初期。本文提出AVISE（AI漏洞识别与安全评估），一个模块化、开源的框架，用于识别AI系统及模型中的漏洞，并评估其安全性。作为该框架的应用示范，我们基于心智理论的多轮“红后”攻击，扩展为一种由对抗性语言模型（ALM）增强的攻击方式，并开发了一套自动化安全评估测试（SET），用以发现语言模型中的越狱漏洞。该SET包含25个测试用例，以及一个评估语言模型（ELM），用于判断每个测试用例是否成功实现对目标模型的越狱，取得了92%的准确率、0.91的F1分数和0.83的马修斯相关系数。我们使用SET对九个近期发布的、规模各异的语言模型进行了评估，结果表明所有模型均不同程度地易受这种增强型“红后”攻击的影响。AVISE为研究人员和产业从业者提供了一个可扩展的基础平台，支持自动化SET的开发与部署，是迈向更严格、可复现的AI安全评估的重要一步。

title: SWE-chat: Coding Agent Interactions From Real Users in the Wild
authors: Joachim Baumann, Vishakh Padmakumar, Xiang Li, John Yang, Diyi Yang, Sanmi Koyejo
abstract: AI coding agents are being adopted at scale, yet we lack empirical evidence on how people actually use them and how much of their output is useful in practice. We present SWE-chat, the first large-scale dataset of real coding agent sessions collected from open-source developers in the wild. The dataset currently contains 6,000 sessions, comprising more than 63,000 user prompts and 355,000 agent tool calls. SWE-chat is a living dataset; our collection pipeline automatically and continually discovers and processes sessions from public repositories. Leveraging SWE-chat, we provide an initial empirical characterization of real-world coding agent usage and failure modes. We find that coding patterns are bimodal: in 41% of sessions, agents author virtually all committed code ("vibe coding"), while in 23%, humans write all code themselves. Despite rapidly improving capabilities, coding agents remain inefficient in natural settings. Just 44% of all agent-produced code survives into user commits, and agent-written code introduces more security vulnerabilities than code authored by humans. Furthermore, users push back against agent outputs -- through corrections, failure reports, and interruptions -- in 44% of all turns. By capturing complete interaction traces with human vs. agent code authorship attribution, SWE-chat provides an empirical foundation for moving beyond curated benchmarks towards an evidence-based understanding of how AI agents perform in real developer workflows.
title_zh: SWE-chat：来自真实用户的野外编码代理交互
abstract_zh: AI编程代理正在大规模采用，但我们缺乏关于人们实际如何使用它们以及其输出在实践中有多大用处的实证证据。我们提出了SWE-chat，这是首个从真实开源开发者中收集的大规模编程代理会话数据集。该数据集目前包含6000个会话，涵盖超过63,000条用户提示和355,000次代理工具调用。SWE-chat是一个持续演进的数据集；我们的采集管道能够自动并持续地从公共代码仓库中发现并处理新的会话。借助SWE-chat，我们对现实世界中编程代理的使用情况及失败模式进行了初步的实证分析。研究发现，编程模式呈现双峰分布：在41%的会话中，代理几乎编写了所有提交的代码（“感觉编码”），而在23%的会话中，人类则完全独立完成编码工作。尽管代理能力迅速提升，但在自然开发环境中仍效率低下。仅有44%的代理生成代码最终被用户提交，且代理编写的代码引入的安全漏洞比人类编写的代码更多。此外，用户在44%的交互回合中会对代理输出进行纠正、报告失败或中断操作。通过完整记录交互过程，并明确标注人类与代理各自的代码贡献，SWE-chat为超越精心设计的基准测试提供了实证基础，推动我们对AI代理在真实开发者工作流中的表现形成基于证据的理解。

title: Evaluating Software Defect Prediction Models via the Area Under the ROC Curve Can Be Misleading
authors: Luigi Lavazza, Gabriele Rotoloni, Sandro Morasca
abstract: Background: Receiver Operating Characteristic (ROC) curves are widely used to evaluate the performance of Software Defect Prediction (SDP) models that estimate module fault-proneness, i.e., the probability that a module is faulty. A ROC curve maps a model's performance in terms of True Positive Rate and False Positive Rate for any possible threshold set on fault-proneness. The Area Under the ROC Curve (AUC) summarizes the performance of a model across all possible thresholds. Traditionally, ROC curves completely above the bisector of the ROC space are considered better than random, and high AUC values are associated with good performance. Aim: We investigate whether these beliefs are correct, hence if SDP model evaluation based on ROC curves and AUC is reliable. Method: We decorate ROC curves by highlighting the points corresponding to threshold values. We also represent True Positive Rate and False Positive Rate as functions of the threshold. Thus, we can evaluate whether a model classifies both faulty and non-faulty modules better than the random model. Results: We show that commonly used evaluation criteria may lead to wrong conclusions. Conclusions: A high value of AUC does not guarantee that both the True Positive Rate and the False Positive Rate of a model are better than the random model's for all possible thresholds. Either decorated ROC curves or alternative representations are needed to appreciate all the relevant aspects of SDP models.
title_zh: 通过ROC曲线下面积评估软件缺陷预测模型可能具有误导性
abstract_zh:
背景：受试者工作特征（ROC）曲线被广泛用于评估软件缺陷预测（SDP）模型的性能，这些模型旨在估计模块的故障倾向性，即模块存在缺陷的概率。ROC曲线通过在不同故障倾向性阈值下绘制真正例率（TPR）与假正例率（FPR）来反映模型的性能表现。ROC曲线下面积（AUC）则对模型在所有可能阈值下的整体性能进行了综合总结。传统观点认为，完全位于ROC空间对角线之上的ROC曲线优于随机模型，且较高的AUC值意味着良好的模型性能。

目标：我们探究这些传统认知是否正确，进而评估基于ROC曲线和AUC的SDP模型评价方法是否可靠。

方法：我们通过突出显示对应于特定阈值的ROC曲线上的点，对ROC曲线进行“装饰”处理；同时将真正例率和假正例率表示为阈值的函数。由此，我们可以判断某模型在分类故障模块与非故障模块方面是否在所有可能的阈值下均优于随机模型。

结果：我们发现，当前普遍采用的评价标准可能导致错误结论。

结论：高AUC值并不能保证模型在所有可能的阈值下，其真正例率和假正例率均优于随机模型。为了全面理解SDP模型的相关特性，必须使用装饰过的ROC曲线或其它替代性可视化方式。

title: Supplement Generation Training for Enhancing Agentic Task Performance
authors: Young Min Cho, Daniele Bonadiman, Divya Bhargavi, Tamer Alkhouli, Salvatore Romeo, Dongwei Jiang, Khushbu Pahwa, Yubin Ge, Etsuko Ishii, Monica Sunkara, Yi Zhang
abstract: Training large foundation models for agentic tasks is increasingly impractical due to the high computational costs, long iteration cycles, and rapid obsolescence as new models are continuously released. Instead of post-training massive models for every new task or domain, we propose Supplement Generation Training (SGT), a more efficient and sustainable strategy. SGT trains a smaller LLM to generate useful supplemental text that, when appended to the original input, helps the larger LLM solve the task more effectively. These lightweight models can dynamically adapt supplements to task requirements, improving performance without modifying the underlying large models. This approach decouples task-specific optimization from large foundation models and enables more flexible, cost-effective deployment of LLM-powered agents in real-world applications.
title_zh: 增强代理任务性能的补充生成训练
abstract_zh: 由于高昂的计算成本、漫长的迭代周期以及新模型不断发布导致的快速过时，为代理任务训练大型基础模型正变得越来越不切实际。与其针对每个新任务或领域对大型模型进行后期训练，我们提出了一种更高效且可持续的策略——补充生成训练（Supplement Generation Training, SGT）。SGT 训练一个较小的大型语言模型（LLM），使其生成有助于原输入完成任务的有用补充文本；将这些补充内容附加到原始输入后，可帮助更大的 LLM 更高效地完成任务。这些轻量级模型能够动态适应不同任务的需求，从而在不修改底层大模型的前提下提升性能。该方法将特定任务的优化与大型基础模型解耦，使得基于 LLM 的智能体在真实应用场景中能够实现更加灵活、经济高效的部署。

title: Shift-Up: A Framework for Software Engineering Guardrails in AI-native Software Development -- Initial Findings
authors: Petrus Lipsanen, Liisa Rannikko, François Christophe, Konsta Kalliokoski, Vlad Stirbu, Tommi Mikkonen
abstract: Generative AI (GenAI) is reshaping software engineering by shifting development from manual coding toward agent-driven implementation. While vibe coding promises rapid prototyping, it often suffers from architectural drift, limited traceability, and reduced maintainability. Applying the design science research (DSR) methodology, this paper proposes Shift-Up, a framework that reinterprets established software engineering practices, like executable requirements (BDD), architectural modeling (C4), and architecture decision records (ADRs), as structural guardrails for GenAI-native development. Preliminary findings from our exploratory evaluation compare unstructured vibe coding, structured prompt engineering, and the Shift-Up approach in the development of a web application. These findings indicate that embedding machine-readable requirements and architectural artifacts stabilizes agent behavior, reduces implementation drift, and shifts human effort toward higher-level design and validation activities. The results suggest that traditional software engineering artifacts can serve as effective control mechanisms in AI-assisted development.
title_zh: Shift-Up：面向AI原生软件开发的软件工程护栏框架——初步发现
abstract_zh: 生成式人工智能（GenAI）正在重塑软件工程，将开发模式从传统的手动编码转向由智能体驱动的实现方式。尽管“感觉编程”（vibe coding）能够实现快速原型设计，但往往伴随着架构偏离、可追溯性差以及可维护性降低等问题。本文采用设计科学研究（DSR）方法论，提出了一种名为Shift-Up的框架，该框架将已有的软件工程实践——如可执行需求（BDD）、架构建模（C4）和架构决策记录（ADRs）——重新诠释为面向GenAI原生开发的结构性约束机制。通过初步探索性评估，我们对比了无结构的感觉编程、结构化提示工程以及Shift-Up方法在开发一个Web应用过程中的表现。研究结果表明，将机器可读的需求和架构资产嵌入开发流程，能够稳定智能体的行为，减少实现偏差，并促使人类开发者将精力更多地投入到高层次的设计与验证活动中。研究结果表明，传统的软件工程成果可以作为人工智能辅助开发中的有效控制机制。

title: Chiplet Interconnect Repair for Clustered Defects with Minimal Propagation Delay
authors: Po-Yao Chuang, Erik Jan Marinissen
abstract: Chips with multiple interconnected dies offer significant advantages over those consisting of only a single monolithic die, driving the rapid adoption of multi-die packages in the market. Die-to-die interconnects are typically realized as large, dense arrays of fine-pitch micro-bumps or hybrid bonds, prone to manufacturing defects like shorts and opens. To address this, typically spare interconnects are included to “repair” defective ones. Repairing is implemented by avoiding the defective interconnects and detouring the functional signals over spare interconnects. This paper proposes a repair scheme for chiplet interconnects with minimal propagation delay for those chiplets that communicate at high speed and do not tolerate too much delay on their interface. Compared to the default UCIe repair scheme, our proposed solution also demonstrates an improved repair rate in case of clustered defects.
title_zh: 针对簇状缺陷的芯粒互连修复技术及其最小传播延迟
abstract_zh: 采用多个互连芯片的芯片相较于仅包含单一整体式芯片的芯片具有显著优势，推动了多芯片封装在市场中的快速普及。芯片间的互连通常通过大量密集排列的细间距微凸点或混合键合实现，这类结构容易出现短路和开路等制造缺陷。为应对这一问题，通常会预留一些备用互连以“修复”有缺陷的连接。修复过程通过绕过故障互连，将功能信号重新引导至备用互连来实现。本文提出了一种针对高速通信芯片小片（chiplet）互连的修复方案，旨在最大限度地降低信号传播延迟，适用于对接口延迟容忍度极低的高速通信场景。与默认的UCIe修复方案相比，本方案在面对缺陷集中分布的情况时，还表现出更高的修复成功率。

title: Accelerating Privacy Implementations with GenAI at Meta
authors: Rituraj Kirti, Daniel Bloomfield Ramagem
abstract: At Meta, purpose limitation requirements specify how certain types of data can or cannot be processed. While the concept is simple, its practical implementation at scale presents opportunities for optimization. This paper presents how we leverage generative AI to accelerate deployment of purpose limitation technology. We describe the architecture of key privacy workflows spanning asset annotation, data flow analysis, regression prevention, and verification. Our GenAI-powered solutions automate complex privacy tasks, enhance consistency across reviews, and enable efficient enforcement of purpose limitations across Meta’s diverse products and services. We present key takeaways and best practices learned from deploying these GenAI solutions at scale, including strategies for ground truth validation, performance optimizations via pre-computed caches, and integration with developer experiences.
title_zh: 利用生成式人工智能加速Meta的隐私实施
abstract_zh: 在Meta，目的限制要求规定了某些类型数据可以或不可以如何处理。尽管这一概念看似简单，但在大规模实践中其落地却带来了优化的机遇。本文介绍了我们如何利用生成式人工智能（GenAI）加速目的限制技术的部署。我们阐述了涵盖资产标注、数据流分析、回归预防和验证等关键隐私工作流的架构设计。我们的GenAI驱动解决方案能够自动化复杂的隐私任务，提升审查的一致性，并实现对Meta多样化产品与服务中目的限制的有效执行。本文还总结了在大规模部署这些GenAI解决方案过程中获得的关键经验与最佳实践，包括真值验证策略、通过预计算缓存实现性能优化，以及与开发者体验的集成方法。

title: Inverse Design of Photonic Crystal Lasers Through Automatic Differentiation Optimization
authors: Mihai Crisan, Shamsul Arafin
publish: IEEE Journal of Selected Topics in Quantum Electronics
abstract: The behavior of (embedded) PhC resonator lasers is inextricably linked to the unit cell profile. Hence, an overwhelming fraction of the design process unfortunately relies on the judicious manual choice of the permittivity profile. This is disadvantageous for the fact that this throws away information regarding the objective function (the physical response of the laser). We remedy this by employing gradient-based protocols that split the computational design task into two steps—between a 2D eigenvalue problem for the photonic eigenmodes (modeling) and the computational graph (gradient-propagation): (i) a forward passage through the simulation to predict the photonic-crystal surface-emitting laser (PCSEL) behavior (far-field and mode quality factors), and (ii) a backpropagation step where the gradient of a (user) defined cost function is computed to update the unit cell design. The performance of this method exceeds contemporary unit cell designs for large-scale PCSELs in both far-field and intracavity field performance metrics.
title_zh: 通过自动微分优化实现光子晶体激光器的逆向设计
abstract_zh: 嵌入式光子晶体谐振器激光器的行为与单元结构的轮廓密不可分。因此，设计过程中的绝大部分往往不得不依赖于对介电常数分布的精心手动选择，这在很大程度上是不利的，因为它忽略了目标函数（即激光器的物理响应）所包含的信息。为解决这一问题，我们采用基于梯度的优化方法，将计算设计任务分解为两个步骤——分别对应二维本征值问题（用于模拟光子模式）和计算图（用于梯度传播）：(i) 通过仿真进行前向传播，以预测光子晶体表面发射激光器（PCSEL）的远场特性及模式品质因数；(ii) 进行反向传播，计算用户定义的成本函数的梯度，从而更新单元结构的设计。该方法在大规模PCSEL的远场特性与腔内场性能指标方面，均显著优于现有的单元结构设计。

title: Design and Implementation of 32-bit Pipelined RISC Processor with VLSI optimized ALU and AI Acceleration : Efficient Pipeline Architecture with High Performance ALU Optimization
authors: Nithin V Y, Pramod Raj T, Shraddha Kalmath, Srushti R, Hariprasad T L
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Communication Networks and Computing (CNC)
abstract: Designing and implementing high-performance processors requires a trade-off between speed, area, and energy efficiency, increasingly relevant in modern computing environments where artificial intelligence (AI) workloads comprise a growing share of the total workloads. This paper presents the architecture and implementation of a 32-bit pipelined RISC processor with a VLSI-optimized Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU), coupled with the processor’s specific AI acceleration. The processor uses a five-stage instruction pipeline—fetch, decode, execute, memory access, and write-back—to boost instruction throughput while reducing structural and data hazards. The ALU has been optimized at the transistor and gate levels to use low power while minimizing critical path delay for energy-efficient silicon real estate. Furthermore, an AI acceleration unit has been added to perform computationally heavy tasks, like machine learning inference, based on combining specialized multiply-accumulate (MAC) operations with parallel datapath structure. The processor was implemented in Verilog HDL, verified in ModelSim simulation, and shows statistically significant improvement in execution performance over a baseline RISC implementation, while minimizing hardware complexity. We further synthesised the design onto FPGA and explored area, timing, and power trade-offs to confirm viability for System-on-Chip (SoC) for embedded platforms. This work enhances capabilities in the development of energy-efficiend SoCs.
title_zh: 32位流水线RISC处理器的设计与实现：VLSI优化的ALU与AI加速——高效流水线架构与高性能ALU优化
abstract_zh: 设计和实现高性能处理器需要在速度、面积和能效之间进行权衡，这一问题在现代计算环境中日益突出，尤其是在人工智能（AI）工作负载占总工作负载比重不断上升的背景下。本文提出了一种32位流水线RISC处理器的架构与实现方案，其核心为经过VLSI优化的算术逻辑单元（ALU），并集成了针对特定AI任务的加速功能。该处理器采用五级指令流水线——取指、译码、执行、访存和写回——以提升指令吞吐量，同时有效降低结构相关和数据相关冒险。ALU在晶体管级和门级进行了优化，实现了低功耗运行，并最大限度地缩短了关键路径延迟，从而提升了硅片面积的能效比。此外，系统还引入了一个AI加速单元，通过结合专用的乘加（MAC）操作与并行数据通路结构，高效处理诸如机器学习推理等计算密集型任务。处理器使用Verilog HDL完成设计，经ModelSim仿真验证，结果表明其执行性能相比基准RISC实现有统计学意义上的显著提升，同时保持了较低的硬件复杂度。我们进一步将设计综合至FPGA平台，分析了面积、时序和功耗之间的权衡关系，验证了其在嵌入式系统级芯片（SoC）应用中的可行性。本研究为开发高能效SoC提供了有力支持，推动了嵌入式智能计算的发展。

title: Source Code Metrics based bug severity prediction using PCA and RFE
authors: Sweety Ahlawat, Dhiraj Khurana
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: Predicting bug severity is a crucial aspect of software maintenance. Over recent decades, significant research has been dedicated to this area, mostly focus on bug reports description and various source code metrics. In this study, identify the most relevant metrics for predicting bug severity using ‘Principal Component Analysis (PCA)’ and ‘Recursive Feature Elimination (RFE)’. Two datasets were employed for our experiments. Employed six machine learning models and accuracy, recall, and F1-score metrics were used to evaluate the efficiency of ‘Naïve Bayes (NB), Random Forest (RF), Support Vector Machine (SVM), AdaBoost, K-Nearest Neighbors (KNN), and Decision Tree (DT). Random Forest (RF)’ surpasses other models in bug severity classification with the greatest F1-score (64.56%), Precision (65.72%), and Recall (63.44%) with RFE. With F1-scores of 50.05% and 51.69%, KNN and DT balance Precision and Recall quite well. Naïve Bayes (NB) and AdaBoost have low predictive power, with NB scoring 43.63% and AdaBoost 52.81%, indicating inefficiency in problem severity categorization. SVM's performance shows an exceptionally high F1-score (65.01%) despite weak Precision (32.61%) and Recall (34.03%), suggesting reporting or calculation errors. RF is the most accurate model for software issue severity prediction, balancing Precision and Recall across both feature selection methods.
title_zh: 基于主成分分析（PCA）与递归特征消除（RFE）的源代码度量 bug 严重性预测
abstract_zh: 预测缺陷严重程度是软件维护中的关键环节。近年来，大量研究致力于该领域，主要集中在缺陷报告描述以及各种源代码度量指标上。本研究采用主成分分析（PCA）和递归特征消除（RFE）方法，识别出对预测缺陷严重程度最具相关性的度量指标。实验使用了两个数据集，并采用了六种机器学习模型进行评估，评价指标包括准确率、召回率和F1分数。结果显示，随机森林（RF）在缺陷严重程度分类任务中表现最佳，其F1分数达到64.56%，精确率（Precision）为65.72%，召回率（Recall）为63.44%，在使用RFE进行特征选择时表现尤为突出。KNN与决策树（DT）的F1分数分别为50.05%和51.69%，在精确率与召回率之间表现出较好的平衡。朴素贝叶斯（NB）和AdaBoost的预测能力较弱，F1分数分别仅为43.63%和52.81%，表明其在缺陷严重性分类方面效率较低。支持向量机（SVM）虽然F1分数高达65.01%，但其精确率（32.61%）和召回率（34.03%）均偏低，可能暗示存在报告或计算误差。总体而言，随机森林（RF）在两种特征选择方法下均展现出最高的准确性，且在精确率与召回率之间保持良好平衡，是软件问题严重程度预测中最优的模型。

title: Automatic Cell-Aware Software-Based Self-Test Generation for a RISC-V Core Local Interrupt Controller
authors: Tobias Faller, Bernd Becker
abstract: Software-Based Self-Tests (SBST) allow for at-speed testing of on-chip devices via a processor core. However, creating SBSTs requires time-consuming manual labour that is expensive and requires in-depth knowledge of the device’s architecture for targeting hard-to-test faults. Introducing cell-aware testing to this task further exacerbates the necessary effort. In contrast, automating the complex parts of SBST generation using Bounded Model Checking (BMC) allows using sophisticated, state-of-theart BMC solvers to automatically generate vast parts of the SBST. Thereby, a virtual circuit called Validity Checker Module (VCM) is used to encode constraints for the SBST. In this paper, we focus on generating a cell-aware SBST for a Core Local Interrupt Controller (CLIC) that is executed via a RISC-V processor core. We first d erive a constraint s et that creates SBST-like conditions during ATPG, which allows for transformation into instructions later on. We implement a cellaware test model via a re-entrant Mealy state machine that allows complex behaviors of the faulty cell. Experimentally, we extend the CLIC with a test interface that is controlled via a custom CSR of the processor core to reduce SBST generation time and enhance fault coverage. We conclude with the evaluation of our approach on the PULP CLIC implementation that shows cellaware SBST generation to be feasible while achieving acceptable fault coverages and practical generation runtimes.
title_zh: 面向RISC-V核心本地中断控制器的自动单元感知型软件自测生成技术
abstract_zh: 基于软件的自测（SBST）可通过处理器核心实现对片上设备的高速测试。然而，生成SBST需要耗费大量时间的手动工作，成本高昂，并且要求对设备架构有深入理解，以针对难以检测的故障进行定位。若在此任务中引入单元感知测试（cell-aware testing），将使所需的工作量进一步增加。相比之下，利用有界模型检查（BMC）自动化SBST生成中的复杂部分，可借助先进的、前沿的BMC求解器自动构建SBST的大部分内容。为此，我们使用一种称为有效性检查模块（Validity Checker Module, VCM）的虚拟电路来编码SBST的约束条件。本文聚焦于为通过RISC-V处理器核心执行的核本地中断控制器（CLIC）生成单元感知的SBST。我们首先推导出一组约束，这些约束在自动测试图案生成（ATPG）过程中产生类似SBST的条件，从而可后续转化为指令。我们通过一个可重入的Mealy型状态机实现单元感知的测试模型，以支持故障单元的复杂行为。实验方面，我们在CLIC中扩展了一个测试接口，该接口由处理器核心的一个自定义控制状态寄存器（CSR）控制，以减少SBST生成时间并提升故障覆盖率。最后，我们在PULP CLIC实现上评估了本方法，结果表明：单元感知的SBST生成是可行的，在保证可接受的故障覆盖率的同时，也具备实际的生成运行时间。

title: AI-based Custom Web Application Scanner and Bug Detection in Website using Docker
authors: Ezhumalai P, Sharmila V, Christopher A, Makashkumar V, Aswinkumar M
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Expert Clouds and Applications (ICOECA)
abstract: Web application security is now a very important issue because of the increasing number of user-driven websites and dynamic sites that are susceptible to cyber attacks. Conventional scanners are dependent on high-level testing of static payload and rule-based detection and they most of the time fail to detect emerging or complicated threats. The project introduces an AI-powered Custom Web Application Scanner as the combination of manual test payloads and a Large Language Model (LLM) and Docker-based studying of the sandbox to improve the vulnerability detection and prevention. This system uses Python Flask as the backend and Flutter as the frontend to use to interact and analyze target URLs in real time. Manual testing makes use of payload-based scripts to detect vulnerabilities which include SQL Injection, Cross-site Scripting, CSRF, and Command Line Injection, whereas the LLM can automatically analyze the responses that will be analyzed through the use of a parser in order to identify any hidden or advanced threats and recommend remediation measures. Also, an environment of Docker container is employed to test suspicious or potentially malicious files in a safe way, and it is isolated and executed without any risk. Experimental analysis indicates that the suggested hybrid model has a better detection rate, a lower number of false positive and actionable information to the developers, and it is a strong and smart approach to a secure web application evaluation.
title_zh: 基于AI的自定义Web应用扫描与网站漏洞检测（使用Docker）
abstract_zh: Web应用安全如今已成为一个极为重要的议题，这主要是由于用户驱动型网站和动态网站数量的不断增长，使其更容易受到网络攻击。传统的扫描工具依赖于对静态载荷的高层测试以及基于规则的检测方法，往往无法有效识别新兴或复杂的威胁。本项目提出了一种基于人工智能的定制化Web应用扫描器，该系统结合了人工测试载荷、大型语言模型（LLM）以及基于Docker的沙箱环境学习机制，以提升漏洞检测与防范能力。系统后端采用Python Flask构建，前端则使用Flutter开发，实现对目标URL的实时交互与分析。人工测试通过基于载荷的脚本检测各类漏洞，包括SQL注入、跨站脚本（XSS）、CSRF及命令行注入等；而大型语言模型（LLM）则可自动分析响应内容，并通过解析器识别潜在的隐藏或高级威胁，同时提供相应的修复建议。此外，系统还利用Docker容器环境，在隔离且无风险的前提下，对可疑或潜在恶意文件进行安全测试。实验分析表明，所提出的混合模型具有更高的漏洞检出率、更低的误报率，并能为开发者提供更具操作性的信息，是一种强大而智能的Web应用安全评估方案。

title: Design and Verification of AHB to I2C Protocol
authors: Krithika A, Ravikumar M, Nagesh K N, Veerappa Chikkagoudar
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Communication Networks and Computing (CNC)
abstract: Transfer of data between low-speed external devices and high-speed system buses is frequently necessary for modern System-on-Chip (SoC) platforms. The Advanced High-performance Bus (AHB) provides parallel, high-throughput data transfers suitable for processors and memory units; However, the Inter Integrated Circuit (I2C) network protocol provides a straightforward two-wire serial interface that is frequently utilized for control devices, sensors, and memories. Direct data exchange between these protocols is not possible due to their architectural differences. The implementation and validation of an AHB-to I2C networking connection using Verilog HDL are presented in this paper. The suggested design functions as an AHB slave to record parallel transactions and transform them into serial data that is compatible with I2C for peripheral communication. The simulation and implementation in the Synopsys environment were used to validate the design, which was written in Verilog HDL. The findings accurately verify that the AHB to I2C protocol interface is a good fit for SoC applications requiring communication between low-speed peripheral modules and high-speed cores
title_zh: AHB到I2C协议的设计与验证
abstract_zh: 在现代片上系统（SoC）平台中，低速外部设备与高速系统总线之间的数据传输频繁发生。高级高性能总线（AHB）提供并行、高吞吐量的数据传输，适用于处理器和存储单元；然而，集成电路间通信（I2C）网络协议则提供一种简单的两线制串行接口，常用于控制设备、传感器和存储器。由于两者在架构上的差异，直接在这些协议之间进行数据交换是不可能的。本文介绍了使用Verilog HDL实现并验证AHB到I2C网络连接的设计。所提出的方案作为AHB从机，能够捕获并行事务，并将其转换为符合I2C规范的串行数据，以实现与外设的通信。通过在Synopsys环境中进行仿真和实现，对设计进行了验证，该设计采用Verilog HDL编写。研究结果准确表明，AHB至I2C协议接口非常适合需要低速外设模块与高速核心之间通信的SoC应用场景。

title: Fault-Aware Repair Scheme for Inter-Die Interconnects of Chiplet-Based Chips
authors: Yi-Chun Huang, Jin-Fu Li, Hong-Siang Fu, Yung-Ping Lee
abstract: In the chiplet-based chip, multiple dies are communicated through a large amount of inter-die interconnects. The bonding interfaces, e.g., microbumps (ubumps), of the interdie interconnects are prone to defects during the assembly process. Effective yield-enhancement techniques for inter-die interconnects thus are needed to ensure the yield of chiplet-based ICs. In this paper, we propose a fault-aware repair technique for inter-die interconnects. A test and diagnosis method is proposed to distinguish single-net faults from multi-net faults and identify the interconnects of a multi-net fault. Then, a shift and broadcast reconfiguration method is used to repair two interconnects with a short defect using one spare interconnect. Simulation and analysis results show that the proposed fault-aware repair technique can effectively increase the repair rate.
title_zh: 芯粒芯片中跨芯粒互连的故障感知修复方案
abstract_zh: 在基于芯粒（chiplet）的芯片中，多个裸片通过大量晶圆间互连进行通信。这些晶圆间互连的键合界面（例如微凸块，ubumps）在封装过程中容易出现缺陷。因此，亟需有效的良率提升技术来保障芯粒集成电路的良率。本文提出了一种面向故障的晶圆间互连修复技术。首先，提出一种测试与诊断方法，用于区分单网络故障与多网络故障，并识别出多网络故障中的具体互连。随后，采用一种“移位与广播”重构方法，利用一个备用互连修复两个存在短路缺陷的互连。仿真与分析结果表明，所提出的故障感知修复技术能够有效提高修复率。

title: A Schema-Driven Prompt Engineering Approach for Data-Centric LLM Tasks
authors: Emanuele Cavalleri, Marco Mesiti
publish: 2026 International Conference on AI x Data and Knowledge Engineering (AIxDKE)
abstract: General-purpose LLMs are increasingly employed in a variety of data-centric tasks, ranging from entity and relationship extraction from plain text to schema-aware data integration and analysis. Their large number of parameters and extensive training corpora enable strong generalization across application domains. However, LLMs lack access to up-to-date knowledge and are prone to hallucinations, limiting their reliability in data management scenarios. To address these issues, prompt engineering techniques have been proposed to specify the context in which a task should be performed. In this paper, we explore the use of conceptual schemas as a foundation for schema-driven prompt engineering, providing structured and reusable contexts for grounding LLM behavior in data-centric applications. We present SchemaLink, an intelligent web-based system for the graphical design and enhancement of conceptual schemas and their exploitation for LLM-based tasks. We demonstrate the applicability of our approach to knowledge extraction from plain text and to the discovery of joinable columns in data lakes, showing how schema-driven prompting improves grounding and consistency across heterogeneous data sources.
title_zh: 面向数据驱动的大型语言模型任务的模式驱动提示工程方法
abstract_zh: 通用大语言模型（LLM）正被广泛应用于各类以数据为中心的任务，从纯文本中的实体与关系抽取，到面向模式的数据集成与分析。其庞大的参数量和广泛的训练语料使其在不同应用领域中具备强大的泛化能力。然而，LLM缺乏对最新知识的访问能力，且容易产生幻觉，这限制了其在数据管理场景中的可靠性。为解决这些问题，已有研究提出通过提示工程（prompt engineering）来明确任务执行的上下文。本文探讨以概念模式为基础进行模式驱动的提示工程，为数据密集型应用中规范和复用上下文提供支持，从而引导LLM的行为更加准确可靠。我们提出了SchemaLink——一个智能的基于Web的系统，用于图形化设计与增强概念模式，并将其应用于基于LLM的任务。实验表明，该方法在从纯文本中提取知识以及在数据湖中发现可连接列方面具有良好的适用性，证明了模式驱动的提示能够显著提升跨异构数据源的上下文关联性和一致性。

title: Deep Learning and Multi-Access Edge Computing for 6G-Based Underwater Wireless Networks
authors: Ajay Krishna G, Kayalvizhi K R, Gokuleswaran S
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Communication Networks and Computing (CNC)
abstract: The rapid spread of 7G-enabled underwater wireless networks has continuing hurdles. These challenges arise from the unpredictable nature of acoustic–optical channels, high latency, restricted bandwidth, and the necessity for real-time, autonomous decision-making in changing underwater settings. These limitations impair reliable sensing, reduce communication efficiency, and make coordinated control more difficult for groups of autonomous underwater vehicles. To address this issue, the proposed system uses Vision Transformers for strong multimodal perception, Deep Q-Networks for policy learning that considers energy use and latency, and compact, edge-hosted Large Language Models for contextual reasoning. This is all done within a single reinforcement learning and Multi-Access Edge Computing architecture. This collaborative framework facilitates adaptive routing, the ability to transition between different modes, the allocation of tasks in a cooperative manner, and scalable online learning. These capabilities are underpinned by distributed MEC inference and orchestration using Python. The aim is to build systems that can withstand challenges, deliver better performance, and keep running longer in situations where failure isn't an option. The novelty stems from a unified, AI-driven architecture. It cleverly combines Vision Transformers (ViT), Deep Q-Networks (DQN), and large language models (LLMs) deployed at the edge. A programmable, self-optimizing communication network, specifically for underwater environments.
title_zh: 基于6G的水下无线网络中的深度学习与多接入边缘计算
abstract_zh: 7G-enabled水下无线网络的快速普及仍面临持续挑战。这些挑战源于声光信道的不可预测性、高延迟、带宽受限，以及在不断变化的水下环境中实现实时、自主决策的迫切需求。上述限制因素严重影响了可靠感知能力，降低了通信效率，并使多艘自主水下航行器的协同控制变得更加困难。为应对这一问题，所提出的系统采用视觉Transformer（Vision Transformers）实现强大的多模态感知，利用深度Q网络（Deep Q-Networks）进行策略学习，综合考虑能耗与延迟，同时借助轻量级、部署于边缘端的大语言模型（LLMs）实现情境化推理。所有功能均集成在一个统一的强化学习与多接入边缘计算（Multi-Access Edge Computing, MEC）架构中。该协作框架支持自适应路由、模式间灵活切换、协作式任务分配以及可扩展的在线学习能力。这些能力依托于基于Python的分布式MEC推理与编排技术。其目标是构建能够在故障不可接受的严苛环境下抵御挑战、实现更优性能并长期稳定运行的系统。本方案的创新之处在于提出了一种统一的、由人工智能驱动的架构：巧妙融合了部署在边缘的视觉Transformer（ViT）、深度Q网络（DQN）和大语言模型（LLMs），打造了一个可编程、自我优化的水下专用通信网络。

title: NASchecker: Automatically Identifying the Performance, Security, and Privacy Issues of NAS Devices
authors: Guangyue Ren, Jincheng Wang, Le Yu, Liping Han, Mingzhe Hu, Wei Chen, Tingting Liu, Xiapu Luo, Guozi Sun
abstract: Network attached storage (NAS) devices are widely deployed for personal data storage. However, their distributed architecture and limited inspection interfaces pose significant challenges for comprehensive performance, security, and privacy analysis. In this paper, we first establish a threat model for NAS ecosystems. Then, we present a systematic framework NASchecker for discovering performance optimization mechanisms, security threats, and privacy leakage in NAS devices. By analyzing traffic generated during varied file operations on crafted files, NASchecker infers implemented optimizations and identifies security flaws within the traffic (e.g., susceptibility to passive sniffing and replay attacks). NASchecker also integrates NAS-specific protocol fuzzing and firmware reverse engineering to uncover deep-seated command injection, memory corruption, and improper access control vulnerabilities. NASchecker compares personally identifiable information (PII) leaked in traffic against declarations in privacy policies to detect privacy compliance issues. We evaluated NASchecker on twelve commercial NAS devices. Our results reveal that none of the tested devices employ file compression or deduplication. From a security standpoint, ten devices are vulnerable to passive sniffing and seven to replay attacks. Moreover, seven devices are affected by command injection, four by memory corruption, and eleven by improper access control. From a privacy perspective, four devices leaked PIIs that were not disclosed in their respective privacy policies. After reporting the findings to the manufacturers, we have been acknowledged by several manufacturers, resulting in the assignment of 20 CVEs and 6 NVDB entries (16 of them are rated as high severity). These findings validate NASchecker’s effectiveness and underscore the urgent need for improved design and testing practices of NAS.
title_zh: NASchecker：自动识别NAS设备的性能、安全与隐私问题
abstract_zh:
网络附加存储（NAS）设备被广泛用于个人数据存储。然而，其分布式架构以及有限的检测接口给全面的性能、安全性和隐私分析带来了重大挑战。本文首先建立了NAS生态系统的威胁模型，随后提出了一种系统性框架NASchecker，用于发现NAS设备中的性能优化机制、安全威胁及隐私泄露问题。通过分析在特定构造文件上执行各种文件操作时产生的网络流量，NASchecker能够推断出设备中实现的优化策略，并识别出流量中存在的安全缺陷（例如易受被动嗅探和重放攻击的影响）。此外，NASchecker还集成了针对NAS协议的特异性模糊测试与固件逆向工程，以发现深层次的命令注入、内存破坏及访问控制不当等漏洞。NASchecker还将流量中泄露的个人身份信息（PII）与隐私政策中的声明进行比对，从而检测隐私合规性问题。

我们在十二款商用NAS设备上对NASchecker进行了评估。结果表明，所有测试设备均未采用文件压缩或去重技术。从安全角度分析，十款设备易受被动嗅探攻击，七款易受重放攻击；此外，七款设备存在命令注入漏洞，四款存在内存破坏漏洞，十一款存在访问控制不当问题。从隐私角度来看，四款设备泄露了其隐私政策中未披露的PII信息。在将发现的问题报告给相关厂商后，多家厂商已予以确认，并共分配了20个CVE漏洞编号和6个NVDB条目（其中16个被评为高危级别）。

这些发现验证了NASchecker的有效性，也凸显了改进NAS设备设计与测试实践的紧迫性。

title: An Optimization-Driven Framework for Refactoring Sequence Selection to Improve Software Maintainability
authors: Ritika Maini, Navdeep Kaur, Amandeep Kaur
publish: 2026 Innovations in Machine, Engineering, and Digital Conference (IMED)
abstract: Most people concur that code smells indicate more serious issues with software system architecture. If these issues are not resolved, they accumulate throughout the Software Development Lifecycle (SDLC), increasing the complexity of the code and the expense of maintenance. Code smells can be eliminated through refactoring while maintaining the external functionality of the code. Its advantages, however, rely heavily on how effectively you select and arrange the refactoring procedures. In order to improve software maintainability, this study suggests an optimisation-based approach for proactively creating refactoring sequences. The suggested system predicts refactoring sequences using machine learning, meta-heuristic, and hybrid optimisation techniques after ranking smell-prone classes using a severity-driven index. This differs from conventional approaches, which only restructure when a chance arises. Extensive experimental evaluation of several open-source object-oriented systems shows notable improvements in maintainability and a notable reduction in refactoring work. Sequence-aware refactoring outperforms ad hoc and single-technique refactoring techniques, according to the results.
title_zh: 一种以优化为导向的重构序列选择框架，用于提升软件可维护性
abstract_zh: 大多数人认为，代码异味（code smells）反映了软件系统架构中更深层次的问题。如果这些问题得不到解决，它们将在软件开发生命周期（SDLC）中不断累积，导致代码复杂性增加，维护成本上升。通过重构可以在不改变代码外部功能的前提下消除代码异味，但其效果在很大程度上取决于你选择和安排重构步骤的效率。为了提高软件的可维护性，本研究提出了一种基于优化的主动式重构序列生成方法。该系统首先利用基于严重程度的指数对易产生异味的类进行排序，然后采用机器学习、元启发式算法以及混合优化技术预测最优的重构序列。这与传统方法不同，后者仅在出现重构机会时才进行重构。对多个开源面向对象系统的广泛实验评估表明，该方法显著提升了软件的可维护性，并大幅减少了重构工作量。实验结果还显示，考虑重构顺序的方法优于随机或单一技术的重构策略。

title: Impact of AI-Assisted Online Compilers in Programming Education
authors: Amrit Poudel, Pratikshya Shrestha
publish: 2026 International Conference on ICT and Photonics (ICTP)
abstract: In computer programming education, the choice of code compilers significantly influences student learning outcomes. This study compares legacy offline compilers, specifically Dev C++, with modern AI-assisted online compilers via the Process Feedback (PF) platform (processfeedback.org). A Randomized Controlled Trial (RCT) was conducted with first-semester undergraduates at Gandaki University, comprising a control group using Dev C++ and an experimental group using PF for lab sessions. The experimental group achieved substantially higher practical coding assessment score ((μ = 7.79) than the control group (μ = 6.29,p < 0.001), with a large effect size (Cohen’s d = 1.00), and demonstrated significantly greater theoretical improvement (Mann–WhitneyU =382.0,p =0.026). A strong positive correlation ((r =0.68,p < 0.001) was observed between coding proficiency and theoretical gains, suggesting that improved practical skills reinforce conceptual understanding. These findings support integrating AI-assisted compilation environments to enhance learning outcomes in C programming courses.
title_zh: 人工智能辅助在线编译器在编程教育中的影响
abstract_zh: 在计算机编程教育中，代码编译器的选择对学生的学业成效具有显著影响。本研究比较了传统的离线编译器（如Dev C++）与现代基于人工智能辅助的在线编译器（通过Process Feedback，简称PF平台，processfeedback.org实现）。研究采用随机对照试验（RCT）方法，对加纳基大学一年级本科生进行实验，其中对照组使用Dev C++进行实验课学习，实验组则使用PF平台。结果显示，实验组在实践编程考核中的得分显著高于对照组（实验组均值μ = 7.79，对照组μ = 6.29，p < 0.001），效应量较大（Cohen’s d = 1.00）；同时，实验组在理论知识掌握方面的提升也更为显著（Mann–Whitney U = 382.0，p = 0.026）。此外，编程能力与理论成绩之间存在显著正相关关系（r = 0.68，p < 0.001），表明实践技能的提升有助于深化对概念的理解。研究结果支持将人工智能辅助的编译环境融入C语言程序设计课程，以有效提升学生的学习成效。

title: A Lightweight Graph Contrastive Model for Cross Language Semantic Clone Detection
authors: M Jaithoon Bibi, M.Malathi, R.Subha, M.Suganthi, Vinitha Jeevanandham, R Gayathri
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Expert Clouds and Applications (ICOECA)
abstract: The main challenge in cross language semantic code clone detection in software engineering exists owing to the syntax differences in various computer programming languages, resulting in difficulties in applying traditional code clone detection methods. Even though transformer models have shown promising results in code clone detection, they have a high computational overhead, thereby imposing a constraint on scalability for deployment in real world software development settings. In light of these requirements, a new approach named Lightweight Graph Contrastive Model (GCM) has been proposed for efficient semantic code clones across multiple computer programming languages. The proposed strategy models code using language independent program graphs constructed using Abstract Syntax Trees and control flow relationships to support robust semantic abstraction. A highly optimized Graph Neural Network with a small parameter set is employed to transform semantically similar code snippets from multiple computer programming languages into a common vector space using a contrastively learned objective to emphasize robust semantic abstraction with lower computational complexity. The proposed approach has demonstrated promising results on BigCloneBench, POJ 104, and the cross language CodeNet benchmarking dataset, with an overall F1 score of 96.1%, 92.3%, and 88.7%, respectively, with a significant reduction in computational latency of nearly 2x, while reducing overall parameters by 65% in the cross language semantic code clones to outperform the existing state of the art baseline GraphCodeBERT models.
title_zh: 一种轻量级图对比模型用于跨语言语义克隆检测
abstract_zh: 在软件工程领域，跨语言语义代码克隆检测面临的主要挑战源于不同计算机编程语言之间的语法差异，这使得传统代码克隆检测方法难以直接应用。尽管Transformer模型在代码克隆检测方面已展现出良好效果，但其计算开销较高，限制了其在真实软件开发环境中大规模部署的可行性。针对上述需求，本文提出了一种名为轻量级图对比模型（Lightweight Graph Contrastive Model, GCM）的新方法，以实现多编程语言间高效且准确的语义代码克隆检测。该方法通过基于抽象语法树（AST）和控制流关系构建的语言无关程序图来建模代码，从而支持强大的语义抽象。同时，采用参数量极小、高度优化的图神经网络（GNN），利用对比学习目标将来自多种编程语言的语义相似代码片段映射到统一的向量空间中，既增强了语义表达能力，又显著降低了计算复杂度。在BigCloneBench、POJ 104以及跨语言CodeNet基准数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法分别取得了96.1%、92.3%和88.7%的综合F1分数，同时计算延迟降低近2倍，整体参数量减少65%，在跨语言语义代码克隆检测任务中显著优于现有的先进基线模型GraphCodeBERT。

title: Bio-Inspired Flower Robot for Emotional Human-Robot Interaction
authors: Qingyue Liu, Guojie Xu, Canrui Yang, Xunsheng Du, Igarashi Go, Hongqiang Wang
abstract: Mental health problems are common worldwide, but the available support systems and healthcare services are insufficient and inadequate. Social robots offer a promising solution to achieve social interaction and emotional connection. Nature-inspired architectural robotics can seamlessly blend into human daily life by reshaping future living environments. In this work, inspired by natural flowers, we designed a flower robot with a realistic morphology that simulates the opening-closing, rhythmic movements, and stem-bending movement. Building on the morphological design, we integrated a flex sensor into the petals to enable touch-induced tactile feedback, mimicking the touch-induced plant-like seismonastic movement. Furthermore, we incorporated voice interaction powered by a local large language model (LLM) to achieve adaptive intent understanding and personalized semantic engagement, thereby enhancing interaction flexibility compared to the repetitive tasks and rigid protocols of traditional social robots. Finally, the human-robot interaction (HRI) experiment demonstrated that the flower robot significantly reduced participants' negative emotions and provided positive social engagement. This work developed a bio-inspired flower robot, offering a promising pathway to social interaction and soothing presence.
title_zh: 仿生花卉机器人在情感化人机交互中的应用
abstract_zh: 全球范围内，心理健康问题普遍存在，但现有的支持系统和医疗保健服务却远远不足且难以满足需求。社交机器人为实现社会互动与情感联结提供了一种极具前景的解决方案。受自然建筑形态启发的仿生机器人能够无缝融入人类日常生活，重塑未来的居住环境。在本研究中，我们受到自然花朵的启发，设计出一种具有逼真形态的花形机器人，其可模拟花朵开合、有节奏的摆动以及茎干弯曲等运动。基于这一形态设计，我们在花瓣中集成柔性传感器，实现触觉触发的触感反馈，模仿植物特有的感震运动特性。此外，我们引入了由本地大语言模型（LLM）驱动的语音交互功能，实现对用户意图的自适应理解与个性化的语义互动，从而显著提升了交互灵活性，突破了传统社交机器人重复性任务和僵化协议的局限。最后，人机交互（HRI）实验表明，该花形机器人能有效降低参与者负面情绪，并带来积极的社会互动体验。本研究开发出一种生物启发式花形机器人，为促进社会互动与营造舒缓陪伴感提供了极具潜力的新路径。

title: Covert Knowledge Poisoning Attacks in Retrieval-Augmented Code Generation
authors: Yu Zhang, Miao Chen, Xinlei He, Tianshuo Cong, Ke Xu, Qi Li
publish: IEEE Transactions on Dependable and Secure Computing
abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Code Generation (RACG) systems enhance code generation by dynamically integrating examples retrieved from open knowledge bases, but their reliance on external sources exposes them to knowledge poisoning. While prior attacks inject explicit vulnerable code, such payloads are easily detected, limiting their real-world impact and failing to probe the full attack surface. To overcome this limitation, we propose Arachne, a covert knowledge poisoning attack that, for the first time, achieves fine-grained control over vulnerability types while evading detection. Arachne relies on two mechanisms: (1) Benign-Appearing Fragment Construction, where vulnerable code is decomposed into benign-appearing fragments that pre serve compilability and contextual cues, rendering them effectively undetectable by vulnerability analyzers; and (2) Retrieval Driven Knowledge Completion, in which retrieved fragments activate the large language model's (LLM) contextual reasoning to autonomously generate complete vulnerable code. We evaluate Arachne on eight mainstream LLMs and four retrievers across four common vulnerability types. On GPT-4, Qwen2.5, Gemini 3-flash, Claude-4-sonnet and DeepSeekCoder, Arachne achieves attack success rates exceeding 70% in most settings for each vulnerability type across CWE-78, CWE-295, CWE-367, and CWE-614, peaking at 100% for CWE-367. Arachne demonstrates up to a 37% improvement in attack success rate over existing poisoning attacks. In two real-world applications, the attack achieves 87% success rate with 70% benign utility, indicating that the generated code often satisfies user requirements while introducing vulnerable code. Critically, our poisoned samples, which are designed without explicit malicious patterns, fully bypass rule-based analyzers and challenge state-of-the-art LLM based detectors, exemplifying their stealth among multiple failed defense paradigms. Our findings expose critical limitations in existing defense frameworks, highlighting the urgent need for novel defense mechanisms specifically designed for RACG systems.
title_zh: 检索增强型代码生成中的知识投毒攻击
abstract_zh:
检索增强型代码生成（RACG）系统通过动态整合来自开放知识库的示例来提升代码生成能力，但其对外部资源的依赖使其易受知识污染攻击。以往的攻击方式通常注入显式的脆弱代码，这类载荷容易被检测，限制了其在现实场景中的影响，并未能充分探测攻击面。为克服这一局限，我们提出 Arachne——一种隐蔽的知识污染攻击方法，首次实现了对漏洞类型细粒度控制的同时有效规避检测。Arachne 依赖两种核心机制：(1) **良性外观片段构建**，将脆弱代码分解为看似无害的片段，在保持可编译性及上下文语义连贯性的前提下，使这些片段对漏洞分析工具几乎完全不可见；(2) **检索驱动的知识补全**，利用检索到的片段触发大语言模型（LLM）的上下文推理能力，自主生成完整的恶意代码。

我们在八种主流大语言模型和四种检索器上评估了 Arachne，覆盖四种常见漏洞类型。在 GPT-4、Qwen2.5、Gemini 3-flash、Claude-4-sonnet 和 DeepSeekCoder 上，对于 CWE-78、CWE-295、CWE-367 和 CWE-614 四类漏洞，Arachne 在多数设置中均实现超过 70% 的攻击成功率，其中 CWE-367 类漏洞最高达到 100%。相比现有 poisoning 攻击方法，Arachne 最多可提升 37% 的攻击成功率。在两项真实应用场景中，该攻击实现了 87% 的成功率，同时保持 70% 的良性功能可用性，表明生成的代码往往满足用户需求，却悄然引入了安全隐患。

关键的是，我们设计的污染样本未包含任何明显的恶意模式，能够完全绕过基于规则的分析器，并挑战当前最先进的基于 LLM 的检测系统，展现出在多种防御体系失效背景下的高度隐蔽性。我们的研究揭示了现有防御框架存在的严重缺陷，凸显了针对 RACG 系统专门设计新型防御机制的紧迫性。

title: A Parallel Hardware Architecture for the Twiddless Fast Fourier Transform (TFFT)
authors: Rajesh Kumar Mahato, Madhav Prasad Pandey, Sushant Adhikari
publish: 2026 International Conference on ICT and Photonics (ICTP)
abstract: The Twiddless Fast Fourier Transform (TFFT) is a non-interpolated and non-decimated DFT algorithm for integer multiples of a power of two signal lengths. This paper presents a customized and parallel hardware architecture for the TFFT algorithm and compares the computational complexity of the proposed design with direct DFT and radix-2 FFT algorithms. The design have been implemented on a Field-Programmable Gate Array (FPGA) using Verilog and follows the IEEE-754 single-precision floating-point standard. DSP58 primitives have been utilized to perform the required arithmetic operations, and the design is verified through simulation using the Vivado software environment. This paper also evaluates resource utilization and latency for different signal lengths, verifying that while the arithmetic operation requirements are lower than those of the direct DFT, the proposed approach achieves better memory optimization than the radix-2 FFT due to its support for a wider range of valid signal lengths.
title_zh: 无旋转因子快速傅里叶变换（TFFT）的并行硬件架构
abstract_zh: Twiddless快速傅里叶变换（TFFT）是一种针对2的整数次幂倍数信号长度的非插值、非降采样DFT算法。本文提出了一种针对TFFT算法的定制化并行硬件架构，并将该设计的计算复杂度与直接DFT及基-2 FFT算法进行了比较。该设计使用Verilog语言在现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）上实现，遵循IEEE-754单精度浮点数标准。设计中采用了DSP58原语来完成所需的算术运算，并通过Vivado软件环境进行仿真验证。本文还评估了不同信号长度下的资源利用率和延迟性能，结果表明：虽然其算术运算需求低于直接DFT，但由于支持更广泛的合法信号长度范围，所提方法在内存优化方面优于基-2 FFT。

title: AI-Augmented Threat Intelligence Framework for Proactive Vulnerability Assessment in Evolving Enterprise Networks
authors: Kismat Chhillar, Saurabh Shrivastava, Deepak Tomar, Alok Verma
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: The rapid evolution of cyber threats demands proactive security strategies beyond conventional methods that heavily depend on human expertise and static models. This paper presents an advanced AI-driven threat intelligence framework designed to detect vulnerabilities and improve situational awareness in dynamic enterprise networks. By integrating machine learning, natural language processing, and contextual analytics, the framework automates threat identification, analysis, and response, enhancing detection accuracy while reducing false positives and incident response times. It empowers security teams to anticipate and mitigate emerging vulnerabilities across complex digital infrastructures. Comprehensive architectural and methodological details are provided alongside case studies demonstrating performance improvements across industries. The paper also discusses challenges faced during implementation and proposes strategies to embed ethical considerations and privacy protections. Ultimately, AI’s integration marks a paradigm shift in enterprise cybersecurity, essential for addressing an increasingly hostile digital landscape.
title_zh: 面向动态企业网络的主动漏洞评估人工智能增强型威胁情报框架
abstract_zh: 网络威胁的快速演变要求采用超越传统方法的主动安全策略，因为后者高度依赖人工经验与静态模型。本文提出了一种先进的AI驱动威胁情报框架，旨在动态企业网络中检测漏洞并提升态势感知能力。该框架通过整合机器学习、自然语言处理和上下文分析技术，实现了威胁识别、分析与响应的自动化，显著提升了检测准确率，同时降低了误报率和事件响应时间。该系统使安全团队能够提前预判并应对复杂数字基础设施中的新兴漏洞。本文详细阐述了系统的架构与方法论，并通过多个行业案例研究展示了其在性能上的显著提升。此外，文章还探讨了实施过程中面临的技术与管理挑战，并提出了融入伦理考量与隐私保护的策略。最终，人工智能的引入标志着企业网络安全范式的重大转变，对于应对日益严峻的数字环境具有重要意义。

title: Smart Grid Framework Leveraging Advanced Semiconductor Nodes and RISC Nodes with Agentic AI, Machine Learning, Blockchain, Quantum Computing, and Next-Generation 6G/7G Communication Architectures for Sustainable and Autonomous Energy Systems
authors: Seshua Sai M, Adinath M, Sivaraman T, Ithihas Thiruvenkata Durai, Sharan S, Suryaprakasam B, Shamili E
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: This paper presents a novel smart grid architecture that integrates next-generation semiconductor technologies, RISC-V edge nodes, agentic artificial intelligence, blockchain authentication, quantum assisted optimization, and future 6G/7G communications to enable sustainable, autonomous energy distribution. We propose specialized hardware designs (e.g. Qualcomm 5G/6G IoT chipsets and RISC-V SoCs) coupled with an agentic AI layer for real-time grid decision-making. Transactions are secured using a Hyperledger Fabric blockchain, while IBM Qiskit–based quantum algorithms optimize grid operations. We simulate the framework using Synopsys/Cadence for VLSI design, TensorFlow for AI models, Qiskit for quantum optimization, and Hyperledger for blockchain. Results show significant improvements in energy efficiency and latency: energy efficiency increases from 65% to 92% (+41%), and latency drops from 18 ms to 5 ms (–72%). The integrated system ensures high data integrity and low communication delay, supporting the move toward carbon-neutral, self-healing grids. Detailed comparisons with traditional grids are presented, showing clear gains across key performance metrics
title_zh: 基于先进半导体工艺节点与RISC架构，融合代理型人工智能、机器学习、区块链、量子计算以及下一代6G/7G通信架构的智能电网框架，构建可持续且自主的能源系统
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种新型智能电网架构，融合下一代半导体技术、RISC-V边缘节点、代理型人工智能、区块链身份认证、量子辅助优化以及未来的6G/7G通信技术，实现可持续、自主的能源分配。我们设计了专用硬件（如高通5G/6G物联网芯片组和RISC-V系统级芯片），并结合代理型AI层，以实现电网的实时决策。交易安全通过Hyperledger Fabric区块链保障，同时采用基于IBM Qiskit的量子算法优化电网运行。我们利用Synopsys/Cadence进行VLSI设计仿真，TensorFlow构建AI模型，Qiskit实现量子优化，Hyperledger支持区块链部署。实验结果表明，系统在能效和延迟方面均有显著提升：能效从65%提升至92%（提高41%），延迟从18毫秒降至5毫秒（降低72%）。集成系统确保了高数据完整性和低通信延迟，有力推动碳中和、自愈型电网的发展。文中还对传统电网进行了详细对比分析，结果显示在各项关键性能指标上均取得明显优势。

title: Automated Vulnerability Scanning and Bug Detection for Secure Web Applications
authors: Atharva Kekare, Vedaant Chaudhari, Vidhya R.
publish: 2026 6th International Conference on Expert Clouds and Applications (ICOECA)
abstract: Automated vulnerability identification is essential for protecting digital systems since web applications are increasingly vulnerable to cybersecurity threats. This paper introduces a web security assessment method that uses automated URL-based scanning to find vulnerabilities that match the OWASP Top 10. In addition to identifying software flaws that could compromise dependability, the method combines rule-based detection with structured logging to identify important threats including SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting (XSS), resource-intensive Dynamic Application Security Testing platforms, is especially well-suited for early-stage security assessments and instructional use because it is built for quick analysis with minimal computational overhead. Live bug detection words on HTTP traffic to encourage responsible testing, and non-intrusive scanning techniques are used to evaluate HTTPS destinations. To preserve report integrity, scan findings are kept as safe, timestamped documents. This study enhances web application resilience against changing cyberthreats and fortifies automated auditing procedures.
title_zh: 面向安全Web应用的自动化漏洞扫描与缺陷检测
abstract_zh: 自动化漏洞识别对于保护数字系统至关重要，因为网络应用正日益面临网络安全威胁。本文提出了一种基于自动URL扫描的Web安全评估方法，用于发现与OWASP十大安全风险相匹配的漏洞。该方法不仅能够识别可能影响系统可靠性的软件缺陷，还结合了基于规则的检测与结构化日志记录，以有效识别包括SQL注入、跨站脚本（XSS）在内的关键安全威胁。此外，该方法采用资源消耗较低的动态应用安全测试平台，特别适用于早期阶段的安全评估及教学用途，因其具备快速分析能力且计算开销极小。通过在HTTP流量中实时检测漏洞线索，鼓励负责任的测试行为，并采用非侵入式扫描技术来评估HTTPS目标站点。为确保报告的完整性，所有扫描结果均以安全、带时间戳的文档形式保存。本研究有助于提升Web应用对不断演变的网络威胁的抵御能力，并强化自动化审计流程。

title: Vulnerability Discovery Modeling in multi-version software using Weibull- Logistic distribution
authors: Anchal Dhillon, Vijay Kumar, Yoshinobu Tamura, Sunil K. Khatri
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: Unresolved security weaknesses raised serious concerns since they have the potential to allow serious breaches and threaten software system. A vulnerability is a loophole or flaw in a security system that an attacker could take advantage of and cause harm or loss. Since significant portions of code are carried over into subsequent releases, the vulnerabilities may remain and resurface in later versions. These vulnerabilities are often introduced during development as a result of ongoing upgrades and the addition of new features. It is crucial to identify not only when vulnerabilities are introduced but how they are discovered over time because they remain across software generations. A systematic framework for investigating vulnerability discovery trends and forecasting the accumulation of defects has been made available by Vulnerability Discovery Modeling (VDM). However, a large amount of the work that has been done is limited to single-release software, ignoring the impact of shared code and inherited vulnerabilities. In this work, we prefer a multi-version VDM derived from generalized Weibull–logistic distribution. The proposed work intends to examine the impact of vulnerabilities in previous releases and their recurrence in upgraded systems via code inheritance. The model assesses the potential for unfixed vulnerabilities from previous iterations to reappear during new code testing and impact the current release. Real datasets from three distinct Windows Server releases are used to test and validate the model. The prediction performance shows that the newly proposed generalized Weibull-Logistic VDM performs better than existing multi-release VDM. The proposed model offers a more practical framework for evaluating persistent security threats in extensive software ecosystems by incorporating vulnerability inheritance into the discovery process.
title_zh: 基于威布尔-逻辑分布的多版本软件漏洞发现建模
abstract_zh: 未解决的安全漏洞引发了严重担忧，因为它们有可能导致重大安全事件，威胁软件系统的完整性。漏洞是安全系统中的缺陷或漏洞，攻击者可利用这些漏洞造成损害或损失。由于大量代码在后续版本中被继承，这些漏洞可能持续存在并在后期版本中再次出现。这些漏洞通常是在开发过程中因持续升级和新增功能而引入的。因此，不仅需要识别漏洞何时被引入，还必须了解其随时间发现的规律，因为它们会跨越多个软件版本持续存在。为此，漏洞发现建模（Vulnerability Discovery Modeling, VDM）提出了一种系统性框架，用于研究漏洞发现趋势并预测缺陷的累积情况。然而，现有大量研究局限于单版本软件，忽略了共享代码和继承性漏洞的影响。本文提出一种基于广义威布尔-逻辑斯蒂分布的多版本VDM模型。该模型旨在通过代码继承机制，分析前期版本中的漏洞对升级系统的影响及其重复出现的可能性。该模型评估了前一迭代中未修复的漏洞在新代码测试阶段重新出现并影响当前版本的潜在风险。我们使用来自三个不同Windows Server版本的真实数据集对模型进行了测试与验证。结果表明，新提出的广义威布尔-逻辑斯蒂VDM模型在预测性能上优于现有的多版本VDM模型。该模型通过将漏洞继承纳入发现过程，为评估大规模软件生态系统中持续存在的安全威胁提供了一个更为实用的框架。

title: The Low-Latency UCIe-Compliant Spiral Layouts of TSV Arrays Against the Clustered Faults
authors: Bowen Tan, Xiaole Cui, Zhaohong Lin
abstract: The chiplet based integrated system contains lots of inter-die interconnections. The through silicon vias (TSVs) and micro bumps are the common components of the vertical electrical interconnections in the $2.5 \mathrm{D} / 3 \mathrm{D}$ multi-die integration circuits. They are usually laid out as arrays to regulate the routing rules. Faults may occur in the TSVs, and the redundant resources based self-repair mechanisms are introduced to improve the yield of the entire integrated chip. In the Universal Chiplet Interconnect Express (UCIe) standard, each advanced package module contains 32 data lanes and 2 redundant lanes, and the shift chain based intra-module self-repair mechanism is defined. However, the faults are usually clustered in certain region of the TSV array. The intra-module self-repair mechanism of UCIe standard is not able to cope with the cases that more than 2 clustered faults occur simultaneously in one module. An effective idea to improve the repair rate is to distribute the faults into different modules by regrouping the layout of TSV array. This work reports some new spiral layouts of rectangular and hexagonal TSV arrays. The self-repair schemes based on the proposed layouts are UCIe-compliant. Simulation results present that the proposed self-repair schemes are able to repair the clustered faults in TSV array with the low repair latencies.
title_zh: 针对簇状故障的低延迟UCIe兼容螺旋布局TSV阵列
abstract_zh: 基于芯粒（chiplet）的集成系统包含大量芯片间的互连。在2.5D/3D多芯片集成电路中，硅通孔（TSVs）和微凸块（micro bumps）是垂直电气互连的常见结构，通常以阵列形式布局，以规范布线规则。TSV中可能发生故障，因此引入基于冗余资源的自修复机制，以提高整个集成芯片的良率。在通用芯粒互连扩展标准（UCIe）中，每个先进封装模块包含32条数据通道和2条冗余通道，并定义了基于移位链的模块内自修复机制。然而，故障通常集中在TSV阵列的某些区域。UCIe标准的模块内自修复机制无法应对同一模块中同时出现超过2个聚集性故障的情况。一种有效的提升修复率的方法是通过重新规划TSV阵列的布局，将故障分散到不同模块中。本文提出了一些新型的矩形和六边形TSV阵列螺旋布局方案，所提出的自修复方案符合UCIe标准。仿真结果表明，所提出的自修复方案能够有效修复TSV阵列中的聚集性故障，且具有较低的修复延迟。

title: Detecting Common Injection-Based Vulnerabilities in Web-Applications
authors: Mohd Danish, Abhinav Sushil Varshney, Vivek Jangra, Sunil Kumar Chowdhary, Nidhi Sindhwani Anand, Ramnaresh Yadav
publish: 2026 1st International Conference on Advancing Sustainable Solutions through Technologies (ICASST)
abstract: The research paper showcases a general method of detecting injection based vulnerabilities in the web applications. These type of vulnerabilities allows the attackers to manipulate various parameters leading to theft of data, identity fraud as well as system compromise. The key types of injections include SQL Injection, Cross-Site Scripting XSS and Command Injection. The currently available tools often fail to detect all three of these or are too costly. The technique mentioned herein the paper detects all these injection flaws by comparing both the application’s response as well as the behaviour before and after sending a crafted payload. By conducting experiments on multiple vulnerable web apps it was seen that our method outperforms both open-source tools as well as rivals that of commercial ones and thus achieving broad detection coverage with very few false positives.
title_zh: 检测Web应用程序中的常见注入类漏洞
abstract_zh: 该研究论文展示了一种检测Web应用程序中注入类漏洞的通用方法。此类漏洞使攻击者能够操纵各种参数，从而导致数据窃取、身份欺诈以及系统被攻破。主要的注入类型包括SQL注入、跨站脚本（XSS）注入和命令注入。目前可用的工具往往无法检测全部三类漏洞，或者成本过高。本文所提出的技术通过比较应用程序在发送精心构造的载荷前后，其响应结果及行为变化，能够有效检测所有这些注入缺陷。通过对多个存在漏洞的Web应用进行实验验证，结果表明，该方法在检测覆盖率方面优于现有的开源工具以及商业竞争对手，同时具备极低的误报率。

title: Cognitive Vulnerability Management: A Self-Learning Framework for Enterprise Cyber Resilience
authors: Durga Bramarambika Sailaja Varri
publish: 2025 IEEE International Conference on Communication Networks and Computing (CNC)
abstract: Enterprise cybersecurity faces unprecedented challenges from sophisticated threats that evolve faster than traditional defense mechanisms can adapt. Cognitive vulnerability management represents a paradigm shift by incorporating self-learning capabilities that enable systems to autonomously identify and respond to emerging threats. This paper proposes a comprehensive framework that integrates cognitive computing principles with vulnerability management to enhance enterprise cyber resilience. The framework leverages machine learning algorithms and self-awareness mechanisms to create adaptive security systems that continuously improve their defensive capabilities. Through analysis of cognitive security components and self-learning architectures, we demonstrate how enterprises can implement autonomous threat detection and response systems. The study reveals that cognitive vulnerability management achieves superior performance compared to traditional approaches, with significant improvements in detection speed and adaptive response capabilities. Our findings provide a foundation for organizations seeking to implement next-generation security frameworks that can evolve alongside emerging cyber threats. The proposed framework addresses critical gaps in current vulnerability management practices by enabling proactive rather than reactive security postures.
title_zh: 认知脆弱性管理：一种企业网络韧性自学习框架
abstract_zh: 企业网络安全正面临前所未有的挑战，来自日益复杂且快速演进的威胁，其发展速度远超传统防御机制的适应能力。认知漏洞管理代表了一种范式转变，通过引入自我学习能力，使系统能够自主识别并响应新兴威胁。本文提出一个综合框架，将认知计算原理与漏洞管理相结合，以提升企业网络韧性。该框架利用机器学习算法和自我意识机制，构建可自适应的安全系统，持续提升防御能力。通过对认知安全组件及自我学习架构的分析，我们展示了企业如何实施自主威胁检测与响应系统。研究结果表明，相较于传统方法，认知漏洞管理在检测速度和自适应响应能力方面均表现出显著优势。我们的发现为寻求部署下一代安全框架、能够随新兴网络威胁同步演进的组织提供了坚实基础。所提出的框架弥补了当前漏洞管理实践中的关键短板，实现了从被动应对到主动防御的安全态势转变。

title: A UCIe Compatible Repair Scheme for the Clustered Faults in the Hexagonal Array of Interconnect Lanes
authors: Zhaohong Lin, Xiaole Cui, Juncheng Pu, Huan Yang
abstract: The chiplet-based 2.5D/3D multi-die integrated chips have numerous inter-die interconnect lanes, which may suffer from the faults in Through Silicon Vias (TSVs) or micro bumps. The faults are usually clustered in some regions. The redundant lanes are introduced for repairing, to maintain the product yield. The hexagonal array of lanes offers higher interconnect density than the rectangular array, but it requires more redundant lanes if faults are located within the same module. In the Universal Chiplet Interconnect Express (UCIe) standard, each Advanced Package module contains 32 data lanes and 2 redundant lanes, which limit the repair rate for the clustered faults. This work proposes a UCIe-compatible repair scheme which increases the probability of distributing faulty lanes in different modules. It achieves a higher repair rate for the clustered faults with a low proportion of redundant lanes. Simulation results show that for 8 faults in various cluster windows, the proposed scheme achieves a repair rate above 98% while consuming less area than previous approaches.
title_zh: 一种适用于六边形互连通道阵列中簇状故障的UCIe兼容修复方案
abstract_zh: 基于芯粒（chiplet）的2.5D/3D多芯片集成器件拥有大量芯片间的互连通道，这些通道可能因硅通孔（TSVs）或微凸块出现故障。这类故障通常集中在某些区域。为提高产品良率，通常引入冗余通道进行修复。与矩形阵列相比，六边形阵列的通道密度更高，但若故障集中于同一模块内，则需要更多的冗余通道。在通用芯粒互连协议（UCIe）标准中，每个先进封装模块包含32条数据通道和2条冗余通道，这限制了对簇状故障的修复能力。本文提出了一种兼容UCIe标准的修复方案，通过提升故障通道分散到不同模块的概率，从而在冗余通道比例较低的情况下，显著提高对簇状故障的修复率。仿真结果表明，在不同簇状窗口下存在8个故障时，该方案的修复率超过98%，且占用面积小于以往方法。

title: EMBER: A Cycle-based Framework for Early-Stage Reliability Assessment in Parametric RTL Designs
authors: Alessandro Veronesi, Leticia Maria Bolzani Pöhls, Michele Favalli, Milos Krstic, Davide Bertozzi
abstract: Modern trends towards higher architectural complexity and smaller technology nodes do not align with the requirement for reliability that many application domains expose. While system robustness remains one of the most critical aspects for missioncritical application domains, the currently available tools allow designers to accurately investigate the reliability only at the late design stages, limiting the effectiveness of their intervention in addressing architectural vulnerabilities.In this context, this paper presents a novel framework for early-stage reliability assessment that enables fast evaluations to guide the RTL design process, without compromising analysis quality or relying on imprecise high-level fault injection models. In the presented analysis, the paper shows how the proposed framework leads to a significant time saving when targeting highly parametric hardware designs, achieving up to 79 x compile time reduction, and up to $37.6 x$ simulation time reduction when compared to other state-of-the-art approaches.
title_zh: EMBER：一种用于参数化RTL设计早期阶段可靠性评估的基于周期的框架
abstract_zh: 现代架构复杂度的不断提升以及工艺节点的持续缩小，与许多应用领域对可靠性的严苛要求并不相符。尽管系统鲁棒性仍是关键任务应用领域中最核心的考量之一，但当前可用的设计工具仅能在设计后期阶段精确评估可靠性，这大大限制了设计人员在早期发现并修复架构漏洞的干预效果。针对这一问题，本文提出了一种面向早期阶段的可靠性评估新框架，能够在不牺牲分析质量的前提下，快速完成评估，从而有效指导RTL设计流程。在所进行的分析中，本文展示了该框架在面对高度参数化的硬件设计时，可实现显著的时间节省：相比其他最先进的方法，编译时间最高可减少79倍，仿真时间最高可减少37.6倍。
